user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Marshall
Product type: Stanmore III speaker
Tone: bold, vintage, premium
Visual style: A sleek blend of retro rock-and-roll aesthetics with modern minimalist design elements emphasizing high-quality materials and craftsmanship.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling with lifestyle aspiration
Format: image

brief.headline: Turn It Up to Legendary.
brief.caption: A Marshall Stanmore III speaker sits prominently on a mid-century modern credenza, flanked by vinyl records and a vintage turntable, against a backdrop of a dimly lit, stylish loft apartment with exposed brick walls and industrial steel beams, casting a moody, rock-and-roll ambiance.
brief.visual_style: A sleek blend of retro rock-and-roll aesthetics with modern minimalist design elements emphasizing high-quality materials and craftsmanship.
brief.typography_style: Bold slab serif with a classic rock influence, echoing Marshall's iconic branding
brief.color_scheme: deep charcoal black, vintage gold, and rich mahogany brown
